[400 Kruse Way (in Lake Oswego)] Big apple tree in the center of the business park between building one and two. Best time to harvest: early to mid-Sept. Falling Fruit season: September-September.

There are blackberries growing along Kruse Way, and around the parking lot at Lake Bible Church. Many within reach from the trail, and good yield! Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-August.

Several Marble Cherry Plum and Yellow Cherry Plums tree's. Late bloomers due to irregular sun exposure. Most are on public land but others border along private property. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-September.

Here-ish lie a bunch of saskatoon plants. There are also trailing blackberries and cow parsnips (Heracleum maximum). Not sure who owns the land but the path is clear and the owner won't hunt you down. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: June-July.
